summary.title: Checkout service latency and error increase
summary.probableCause: Database connection pool saturation affecting checkout-service request handling.

case.title: Checkout service latency and error increase

output.probableCause: Database connection pool saturation affecting checkout-service request handling.
recommendation: Do not make an automatic production change.
Capture current database connection, recent deployment, and traffic context.
Escalate to the service owner if saturation persists.
Consider restart or capacity change only after approval.
